mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.ul SET ch_name = #{newName} WHERE ch_name = #{oldName}
mapper.select: SELECT clan_name FROM clandb.ul WHERE ch_name = #{chName} LIMIT 1
SELECT clan_name, permi FROM clandb.ul WHERE ch_name = #{chName} LIMIT 1
SELECT ch_name FROM clandb.ul WHERE permi = '2' AND clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT ch_name FROM clandb.ul WHERE clan_name = #{clanName}
SELECT user_id FROM clandb.ul WHERE ch_name = #{chName} AND clan_name = #{clanName} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM clandb.ul WHERE ch_name = #{chName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clandb.ul (idx, user_id, ch_name, clan_name, ch_type, ch_lv, permi, join_date, del_active, p_flag, k_flag, m_icon_cnt) VALUES (#{idx}, #{userId}, #{chName}, #{clanName}, #{chType}, #{chLv}, #{permi}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{delActive}, #{pFlag}, #{kFlag}, #{mIconCnt})
mapper.update: UPDATE clandb.ul SET permi = '0' WHERE ch_name = #{chName}
UPDATE clandb.ul SET permi = '2' WHERE ch_name = #{chName}
UPDATE clandb.ul SET permi = '0' WHERE clan_name IN (SELECT clan_name FROM clandb.ul WHERE ch_name = #{chName})
UPDATE clandb.ul SET m_icon_cnt = #{mIconCnt} WHERE ch_name = #{chName}
